title: HBM capacity expansion plan for 2H26
summary: Board approved capex to expand HBM production lines; shipments guidance remains intact, management flags near-term margin pressure due to ramp costs.

title: Minor fire at M15 line; no injuries
summary: A small incident caused brief downtime at M15; damage limited, expected production impact under 48 hours. Insurance coverage confirmed.

title: Supply contract with European EV maker
summary: Five-year NCM cell supply agreement (~12 GWh). Deliveries start in Q3 2026; management estimates mid-single-digit revenue contribution in year one.

title: Update on warranty provision for legacy 2020 cells
summary: Additional KRW 120b provision related to older-generation packs; one-off impact recognized this quarter, no change to 2026 capacity plan.

title: Interim dividend schedule announced
summary: Board confirmed Q1 dividend timetable; record date unchanged, payment in early May pending customary procedures.

title: Preliminary March sales disclosure
summary: Consolidated revenue up 2.4% m/m; seasonal smartphone shipments supported, memory ASP stable.

title: AI compute partnership disclosure
summary: MOU with a major cloud provider to secure incremental GPU capacity; shared capex model intended to support generative AI services.

title: Biosimilar approval in EU
summary: EMA approved CT-P43 for multiple indications; commercial launch targeted in H2 2026.
